**输入：** nums = [1,1,2,2,1,1], queries = [[0,5,4],[0,3,3],[2,3,2]]

**输出：** [1,-1,2]

**解释：**

| 查询      | 子数组             | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |
| :-------- | :----------------- | :--- | :----------- | :--- |

| [0, 3, 3] | [1, 1, 2, 2]       | 3    | 1 → 2, 2 → 2 | -1   |
| [2, 3, 2] | [2, 2]             | 2    | 2 → 2        | 2    |

 

**示例 2:**

**输入：**nums = [3,2,3,2,3,2,3], queries = [[0,6,4],[1,5,2],[2,4,1],[3,3,1]]

| 查询      | 子数组                | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |

| [1, 5, 2] | [2, 3, 2, 3, 2]       | 2    | 2 → 3, 3 → 2 | 2    |
| [2, 4, 1] | [3, 2, 3]             | 1    | 3 → 2, 2 → 1 | 3    |
| [3, 3, 1] | [2]                   | 1    | 2 → 1        | 2    |

- `1 <= nums.length == n <= 104`

function solve(nums, queries) {
  const ans = [];
  for (const [li, ri, threshold] of queries) {
    const freq = {};
    for (let i = li; i <= ri; i++) {
      const num = nums[i];
      freq[num] = (freq[num] || 0) + 1;
    }
    let maxFreq = -1;
    let res = -1;
    for (const key in freq) {
      const count = freq[key];
      if (count >= threshold) {
        if (count > maxFreq || (count === maxFreq && key < res)) {
          maxFreq = count;
          res = key;
        }
      }
    }
    ans.push(res);
  }
  return ans;
}
